creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193557
Script to fix origins of affected ports in the package DB

The portmaster rewrite I'm working on is able to correctly update the KDE4 ports even though port origins and package names have been simultaneously changed.

But I'm not going to make the current portmaster port resolve this situation, since it needs non-trivial changes and I'd rather work on the new version that does not share any code with the current port.

The attached script should have been posted in the UPDATING entry for the KDE4 port and package name change. My request to add it to the UPDATING entry has been ignored, though.
